Giga Images

Module of generate images for PLUS-users

class giga_images.GigaCreator(bot)[source]

Class of create image for plus-user.

Parameters:

bot (TeleBot) –

__check_generate_or_cancel(message)

Check generation.

Parameters:

message (Message) – Query from user.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

__handler_query(call)

Manage of query from plus-user for create image.

Parameters:

call (CallbackQuery) – Call-Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None

get_query(call)[source]

Func of get query from plus-user for create image.

Parameters:

call (CallbackQuery) – Callback Query.

Returns:

None.

Return type:

None
